title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers presents five techniques for reducing AI hallucinations in agent systems: semantic tool selection to reduce context window size, graph RAG for precise aggregations and multi-hop reasoning, multi-agent validation for error catching, symbolic guardrails implemented as code hooks, and runtime guardrails for agent self-correction. The techniques reduce token waste, improve accuracy, and catch failures before users encounter them.
